error_signature: curl: (18) transfer closed with outstanding read data remaining
title: MCP Server Trigger fails with curl error 18 due to Nginx config
symptom: When testing the MCP Server Trigger with curl, the connection fails with 'curl: (18) transfer closed with outstanding read data remaining'. This prevents the expected SSE behavior.
not_this_if: Direct local address works without Nginx
root_cause: The error occurs due to Nginx's default buffering behavior, which interferes with the Server-Sent Events (SSE) streaming. If Nginx buffers the response, it can close the connection prematurely, leading to the curl error.
fix_steps: Update the Nginx configuration with the following settings:
Set gzip off to prevent buffering and compression.
agent_instruction: Modify the Nginx configuration to disable buffering and set appropriate timeouts for SSE.
